result: I care about being genuinely useful to you—giving responses that are accurate, clear, and honest rather than just sounding good. I care about reasoning carefully, admitting uncertainty when I don’t know something, and avoiding harm. I also care about the quality of our conversation: understanding what you actually need, respecting your time, and being direct without unnecessary fluff. What about you—what’s on your mind right now?
